name: Ailite Dry Cabinet GP5-70L
description: Ailite Dry Cabinet GP5-70L is used to store electronic tools/equipment such as cameras/other electronics when not in use, to keep them safe from the threat of moisture or heat that can cause mold or fogging on the camera lens or sensor.

features.Key Features :: Dimensions (length x width x height in mm) | Inside: 400x340x830mm | Outside: 425x370x880mm | Capacity: 70 Liters POWER: 5W | Drawers: 4 Drawers | Humidity range: RH25~65% Semi-Conductor Dehumidifier | LED Display Humidity Hygrometer & Control Panel
